deleteDialog.confirmPrefix: Are you sure you want to delete
deleteDialog.description: Routing references to this upstream will be automatically cleaned up. If this upstream is the primary for a tier, the first fallback will be promoted.
deleteDialog.title: Delete Upstream
diagnostics.title: Direct routing names need attention
empty.description: Add a provider account, deployment, or proxy route to get started with routing.
empty.title: No upstream nodes configured
form.connectivity.title: Connectivity Test
form.errors.idExists: An upstream with this ID already exists
form.errors.modelRequired: At least one model is required
form.errors.modelsUnique: Model IDs must be unique within this upstream
form.errors.needModelForTest: Need at least one model to test
form.help.modelAliases: Aliases are client-facing shortcuts. Avoid reusing a real model ID from any upstream, because exact model IDs win during direct routing.
form.help.modelPrefixes: Prefixes route future model names by family, such as claude-* or gpt-*, without making the upstream ID model-specific.
form.labels.apiKeyEdit: API Key (blank = keep current, test uses saved key)
form.placeholders.keepExistingKey: Leave blank to keep existing key
form.warnings.aliasAlreadyDefined: Alias "{{alias}}" is already defined under {{owners}}. Direct alias routing will use config order.
form.warnings.aliasMatchesModel: Alias "{{alias}}" is already a real model ID. Exact model IDs win before aliases.
form.warnings.aliasMatchesUpstream: Alias "{{alias}}" is also an upstream ID. Aliases resolve before upstream ID shortcuts.
form.warnings.aliasTargetMissing: Alias "{{alias}}" points to "{{target}}", which is not in this upstream's model list.
form.warnings.modelAlreadyListed: Model "{{model}}" is already listed under {{owners}}. Direct requests will use the first matching upstream in config order.
form.warnings.prefixAlreadyConfigured: Model prefix "{{prefix}}-*" is already configured under {{owners}}. Prefix routing will use config order.
form.warnings.title: Direct routing naming warnings
form.warnings.upstreamIdMatchesModel: Upstream ID "{{id}}" is already a real model ID. Direct routing checks model IDs before upstream shortcuts.
nodes.description: Provider accounts, deployments, proxy routes, and their model lists
nodes.title: Upstream Nodes
quickReference.subtitle: grouped by upstream, click any model ID to copy
quickReference.title: Quick Model Reference
tierRecommendation.selectCapabilities: Select capabilities above to see tier recommendations
